rationale: The citing paper centers on online display ad repetition/weariness and user website visits, whereas the cited paper examines media-coverage effects in a supermarket price war (market share, pricing, investor returns), which is a clear construct/domain mismatch in the notes. The matched evidence is only a single DOI match (reference index 65) with no in-text citation context or other signs of direct method/theory adoption. Given this, the citation appears more likely to be incidental/background than substantively used.
